nasb.text: For it is evident that our Lord was descended from Judah, a tribe with reference to which Moses spoke nothing concerning priests.

esv.text: For it is evident that our Lord was descended from Judah, and in connection with that tribe Moses said nothing about priests.

cnv.text: 我們的主明明是從猶大支派出來的，關於這個支派，摩西並沒有提及祭司的事。

ccb.text: 显然，我们的主基督属于犹大支派，摩西从来没有说这个支派会出祭司。

csbs.text: 就是说，我们的主明显是从犹大支派兴起的，而对于这个支派，摩西从来没有提到有关祭司的事。
